SessionStart.command:
echo 'Kraken DevFoundry Pair-Programming Reminder:
1. Check .github/agent-context/website-slices.md for your slice boundaries.
2. Do not edit files outside your assigned slice.
3. Do not resolve unrelated conflicts or refactor adjacent systems.
4. If you need to edit a shared file or blocked file, stop and ask.
5. When stopping, provide a handoff summary to the next agent.
6. Persist crucial reusable findings to repo memory; ignore transient noise.

Use the start-website-slice or continue-website-slice prompts to begin.
'
SessionStart.windows: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Write-Host 'Kraken DevFoundry Pair-Programming Reminder:' -ForegroundColor Cyan; Write-Host '1. Check .github/agent-context/website-slices.md for your slice boundaries.' -ForegroundColor White; Write-Host '2. Do not edit files outside your assigned slice.' -ForegroundColor White; Write-Host '3. Do not resolve unrelated conflicts or refactor adjacent systems.' -ForegroundColor White; Write-Host '4. If you need to edit a shared file or blocked file, stop and ask.' -ForegroundColor White; Write-Host '5. When stopping, provide a handoff summary to the next agent.' -ForegroundColor White; Write-Host '6. Persist crucial reusable findings to repo memory; ignore transient noise.' -ForegroundColor White; Write-Host '' -ForegroundColor White; Write-Host 'Use the start-website-slice or continue-website-slice prompts to begin.' -ForegroundColor Cyan"
